    @pytest.mark.functionality
    def test_preserves_header_and_time_whitespace(
        self,
        client: httpx.Client,
        local_source_server,
    ) -> None:
        """Headers and time-like text preserve significant surrounding whitespace."""
        dataset_id = _ingest_source(
            client,
            local_source_server,
            path="/header_time_whitespace.csv",

    def test_rowid_ignores_sort(
        self,
        client: httpx.Client,
        cp2_dataset_id: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Object rows report original source rowid values under sorted pagination."""
        payload = assert_ok_envelope(
            dataset_request(
                client,
                cp2_dataset_id,
                params={"_shape": "objects", "_sort": "age", "_size": "2"},
            )
        )
        assert payload["rows"][0]["name"] == "Bob"
